title: Assistant Store Manager - Nykaa Retail - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Nykaa Retail - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail:
Nykaa Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
